<!-- Text analysis operations specific to this tradition -->

<!-- How does this tradition resolve conflicts between obligations? -->

**What graph categories does it introduce?**
<!-- How does this tradition organize knowledge? What kinds of edges are meaningful? -->

- [ ] Idea / proposal
- [ ] Skeleton with type signatures

- [ ] Complete with tests
